title: Product Activation
description: Product Activation v1 contract for product/config activation. Product Activation is not sellable and cannot override Operational Core Sellable Gate, Recall, Sale Lock, or Hold.
$comment: Sources: PACK-02 Product Activation Resolver and Guard. TODO: final activation resolver status taxonomy is not fully specified.

required_chain.description: Minimum Product Activation readiness chain from PACK-02.

sellable_dependency_status.description: Operational Core sellable dependency summary; Product Activation must not be treated as sellable.

guard_block_reasons.description: Reasons why Product Activation is blocked, e.g. missing config/evidence/smoke or Formula G1 not active.
